title: Nikicraft
description: Optimized modpack for Nikicraft server, ensuring smooth gameplay and communication on 1.21.10.
body:
# Nikicraft

The Nikicraft Modpack is tailored specifically for the **Nikicraft server** to enhance both **communication** and **performance**. It includes carefully selected mods to provide a smooth and optimized gameplay experience, while also being simple to maintain and easy to expand with additional client-side features.

The pack is built for Minecraft **1.21.10**, featuring support for a large number of players and a focus on ensuring stability during server-wide events. While the core pack is designed for compatibility and optimization, players are free to add their own quality-of-life or visual enhancements. It also includes the Simple Voice Chat Mod to communicate on the server with each other.

___

Das Nikicraft Modpack ist speziell auf den **Nikicraft-Server** zugeschnitten, um sowohl die **Kommunikation** als auch die **Leistung** zu verbessern. Es enthält sorgfältig ausgewählte Mods, um ein reibungsloses und optimiertes Spielerlebnis zu bieten, während es gleichzeitig einfach zu warten ist und leicht mit zusätzlichen clientseitigen Funktionen erweitert werden kann.

Das Paket wurde für Minecraft **1.21.10** entwickelt und bietet Unterstützung für eine große Anzahl von Spielern sowie einen Schwerpunkt auf die Gewährleistung der Stabilität bei serverweiten Ereignissen. Während das Kernpaket auf Kompatibilität und Optimierung ausgelegt ist, steht es den Spielern frei, ihre eigenen Lebensqualitäts- oder visuellen Erweiterungen hinzuzufügen. Es enthält auch die Simple Voice Chat Mod, um auf dem Server miteinander zu kommunizieren.



<details>
<summary>included mods</summary>


* **3D Skin Layers**: Adds layered 3D skin rendering. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
* **Animatica**: Adds animated textures & visual effects. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
* **AppleSkin**: Shows hunger and saturation values in the HUD. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
* **Auto Reconnect Reforged**: Automatically reconnects you to a server after disconnects. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-reconnect-reforged)
* **BadOptimizations**: Miscellaneous performance optimizations for better FPS. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
* **BetterF3**: Overhauls the debug-screen (F3) for clearer info and layout. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
* **BetterGrassify**: Improves grass/block transitions for nicer visuals. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify)
* **Better Mount HUD**: Improves the HUD layout when riding mounts (horses, pigs, etc.). [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)
* **Boat Item View**: Lets you see contents of boats / boat inventories. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view)
* **Bundles Beyond**: Adds improvements for bundles and item stacking. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundles-beyond)
* **Capes**: Adds customizable capes support. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
* **Chat Heads**: Adds player heads next to their chat messages. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
* **CICADA**: Adds extra animations & smoothness to the game visuals. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada)
* **Collective**: Adds client-side improvements used by several other mods. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)
* **Controlling**: Adds a searchable keybind menu for easier controls. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
* **Continuity**: Enables connected textures for blocks—smoother visuals. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
* **Cubes Without Borders**: Cleaner UI panels and boxes without default borders. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)
* **Cull Leaves**: Makes leaves more transparent at a distance — helps visibility & performance. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
* **Dynamic FPS**: Saves FPS when Minecraft is not in focus (background) → better performance multitasking. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
* **Elytra/Chestplate Swapper**: Allows you to quickly swap between an Elytra and a chestplate with a single keypress (toggleable keybind). Modrinth Link
* **Entity Culling**: Prevents rendering of entities not visible — boosts FPS. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
* **Entity View Distance**: Customize how far entities are rendered — better for performance. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance)
* **EMF – Entity Model Features**: Extra model & texture features for entities and mobs. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
* **ETF – Entity Texture Features**: Adds texture enhancements for mobs/entities. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
* **Fabrishot**: Allows taking extremely high resolution screenshots. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
* **Fadeless**: Removes screen fade effects when changing dimensions or reloading. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless)
* **Falling Leaves**: Adds aesthetic falling leaves particles to forests/trees. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
* **FerriteCore**: Reduces memory usage, helps with smoother performance. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
* **Freecam**: Allows you to move the camera freely without moving player — good for screenshots / builds. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
* **Gamma Utils (Fullbright)**: Adds easy fullbright toggle / gamma control. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
* **ImmediatelyFast**: Improves rendering speed & reduces stutters. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
* **Indium**: Improves rendering compatibility with Sodium + contributes performance fixes. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
* **Iris Shaders**: Enables shaders with Fabric + Sodium support for fancy visuals. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
* **LambDynamicLights**: Adds dynamic lighting to items, mobs, and players. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
* **Lighty**: Shows block light updates visually to help building & visibility. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
* **Litematica**: Lets you place, view, and save building schematics — helpful für große Builds. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
* **Lithium**: Significant optimization mod — general performance improvements. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
* **Main Menu Credits**: Adds custom text/credits screen in the main menu. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/main-menu-credits)
* **Model Gap Fix**: Fixes visual gaps in block models — cleaner world visuals. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/model-gap-fix)
* **Mod Menu**: In-game menu to view and manage installed mods. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* **More Chat History**: Stores more chat history, helpful auf Servern. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chat-history)
* **More Culling**: Additional culling optimizations for better FPS. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
* **Mouse Tweaks**: Smarter inventory management and item movement. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
* **No Chat Reports**: Disables chat-reporting features for privacy / clean chat. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
* **Not Enough Animations**: Adds smoother/better animations for actions & mobs. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
* **OptiGUI**: Enhances GUI visuals & compatibility—better UI experience. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
* **Optiboxes**: Improves container GUIs / boxes in inventory. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/optiboxes)
* **Paginated Advancements**: Cleaner, paginated advancement menu — less clutter. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/paginated-advancements)
* **Ping View**: Shows server ping in-game. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-view)
* **Puzzle**: Adds resource-pack improvements & UI tweaks. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)
* **Reese’s Sodium Options**: Adds extra graphics settings when using Sodium. [Modrinth Link](https=>//modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
* **Remove Reloading Screen**: Removes the reload screen when resource packs reload. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/remove-reloading-screen)
* **Scribble**: Lets you draw/write on signs, maps and more. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble)
* **Searchables**: Adds search bar to many GUIs for easier navigation. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
* **Server Pinger Fixer**: Fixes server ping / connection issues. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pinger-fixer)
* **Shulker Box Tooltip**: Shows contents of shulker boxes when hovering. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
* **Simple Voice Chat**: Adds proximity-based voice chat. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
* **Sodium**: Major rendering optimization mod — higher FPS & smoother world. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) 
* **Sodium Extra**: Adds additional rendering/visual options on top of Sodium. [Modrinth Link](https=>//modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) 
* **Sound Physics Remastered**: Adds more realistic sound propagation and acoustics. [Modrinth Link](https=>//modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
* **Spark**: Performance profiler — helps track lag and optimize client/server. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)
* **Visuality**: Ambient particle & visual enhancer for a better look. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
* **Voxy**: UI & model enhancements for a cleaner look. [Modrinth Link](https=>//modrinth.com/mod/voxy)
* **Xaero Zoomout**: Extends zoom level of Xaero maps. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaero-zoomout)
* **Xaero’s Minimap**: Adds a configurable minimap with waypoints. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
* **Xaero’s World Map**: Adds a world map to view explored areas. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
  
* **XaeroPlus**: Enhances minimap/world-map features with extra options. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeroplus)
  
* **Zoomify**: Adds smooth zooming like OptiFine. [Modrinth Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)


These mods are selected to enhance your gameplay experience on the Nikicraft server. 

</details>
